option.name: originalContent
option.value:
{% import "./macros.njk" as macros %} Towtruck {% set baseUrl = dPlusBaseUrl if dPlusMode else "/" + org %}

Towtruck

{% if dPlusMode %} Exit D+ mode {% else %} D+ mode {% endif %}
{% if dPlusMode %}
This dashboard shows only repos not marked GovPress.
{% endif %}

{{ org }}

{% if totalRepos === 1 %} There is 1 repository {% else %} There are {{ totalRepos }} repositories {% endif %} that Towtruck is tracking for {{ org }}.

Critical vulnerabilities

{{ totalCriticalVulnerabilities }}

Total vulnerabilities

{{ totalVulnerabilities }}

{% set criticalParams = baseUrl + "?alertFilter=criticalOnly" %} {% if sortBy %}{% set criticalParams = criticalParams + "&sortBy=" + sortBy %}{% endif %} {% if sortDirection %}{% set criticalParams = criticalParams + "&sortDirection=" + sortDirection %}{% endif %} {% if tag %}{% set criticalParams = criticalParams + "&tag=" + tag %}{% endif %} Critical only {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Critical alerts", "criticalSeverityAlerts", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}}
{% set anyAlertsParams = baseUrl + "?alertFilter=anyAlerts" %} {% if sortBy %}{% set anyAlertsParams = anyAlertsParams + "&sortBy=" + sortBy %}{% endif %} {% if sortDirection %}{% set anyAlertsParams = anyAlertsParams + "&sortDirection=" + sortDirection %}{% endif %} {% if tag %}{% set anyAlertsParams = anyAlertsParams + "&tag=" + tag %}{% endif %} Any alerts {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Total alerts", "totalOpenAlerts", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}}
{% set resetParams = baseUrl %} {% set resetParamSep = "?" %} {% if tag %}{% set resetParams = resetParams + resetParamSep + "tag=" + tag %}{% set resetParamSep = "&" %}{% endif %} {% if sortBy %}{% set resetParams = resetParams + resetParamSep + "sortBy=" + sortBy %}{% set resetParamSep = "&" %}{% endif %} {% if sortDirection %}{% set resetParams = resetParams + resetParamSep + "sortDirection=" + sortDirection %}{% set resetParamSep = "&" %}{% endif %} Reset
{{macros.sortableCardHeader("Open issues", "openIssues", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Open bot PRs", "openBotPrCount", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Open PRs", "openPrCount", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Updated at", "updatedAt", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Most recent PR", "mostRecentPrOpenedAt", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Oldest open PR", "oldestOpenPrOpenedAt", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Most recent issue", "mostRecentIssueOpenedAt", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}} {{macros.sortableCardHeader("Oldest open issue", "oldestOpenIssueOpenedAt", sortDirection, sortBy, baseUrl, alertFilter, tag)}}

Date format: {% set ddmmyyParams = baseUrl + "?dateFormat=DD%2FMM%2FYY" %} {% if sortBy %}{% set ddmmyyParams = ddmmyyParams + "&sortBy=" + sortBy %}{% endif %} {% if sortDirection %}{% set ddmmyyParams = ddmmyyParams + "&sortDirection=" + sortDirection %}{% endif %} {% if tag %}{% set ddmmyyParams = ddmmyyParams + "&tag=" + tag %}{% endif %} {% if alertFilter %}{% set ddmmyyParams = ddmmyyParams + "&alertFilter=" + alertFilter %}{% endif %} DD/MM/YY {% set mmddParams = baseUrl + "?dateFormat=MM%2FDD%2FYYYY" %} {% if sortBy %}{% set mmddParams = mmddParams + "&sortBy=" + sortBy %}{% endif %} {% if sortDirection %}{% set mmddParams = mmddParams + "&sortDirection=" + sortDirection %}{% endif %} {% if tag %}{% set mmddParams = mmddParams + "&tag=" + tag %}{% endif %} {% if alertFilter %}{% set mmddParams = mmddParams + "&alertFilter=" + alertFilter %}{% endif %} MM/DD/YYYY

{{ repo.name }} {% if repo.language %} {{ repo.language }} {% endif %}
{% if repo.totalOpenAlerts !== undefined %}
{% set hasAlerts = repo.criticalSeverityAlerts and repo.criticalSeverityAlerts > 0 %}

{{ repo.mediumSeverityAlerts }}

{{ repo.lowSeverityAlerts }}

    • {% endfor %}

    {% for createdAt in repo.otherOpenAlertsCreatedAt %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% else %} No open vulnerabilities. {% endif %}

{% if repo.dependencies.length === 1 %} 1 dependency: {% else %} {{ repo.dependencies.length }} dependencies: {% endif %}

    {% for dependency in repo.dependencies %}
  • {{ dependency.name }} {% if dependency.version %} v{{ dependency.version }} {% endif %} {% if dependency.tag %} {{ dependency.tag }} {% endif %} {% if dependency.isOutdated %} {{ dependency.changelog }} v{{ dependency.latestVersion }} {% endif %} {% if dependency.isEndOfLifeSoon %} Support ends {{ dependency.endOfLifeRelative }} {% elif dependency.isOutOfSupport %} Support ended {{ dependency.endOfLifeRelative }} {% endif %}
    • {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No dependencies have been discovered.
Please make sure that Renovate has been configured on the repository to produce a dependency dashboard.

{% endif %}
{% else %}

No repositories found.

{% endfor %}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
